translations.text: For those who were aware of God there is supreme fulfilment:
private gardens, vineyards,
nubile, well-matched companions,
and an overflowing cup.

text_qpc_hafs: لَّا يَسۡمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغۡوٗا وَلَا كِذَّٰبٗا ٣٥
text_uthmani: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا كِذَّٰبًا

translations.text: There they will hear no vain or lying talk:
a reward from your Lord, a fitting gift

text_qpc_hafs: رَّبِّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِۖ لَا يَمۡلِكُونَ مِنۡهُ خِطَابٗا ٣٧
text_uthmani: رَّبِّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ۖ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِنْهُ خِطَابًا

translations.text: from the Lord of the heavens and earth and everything between, the Lord of Mercy. They will have no authority from Him to speak.

text_qpc_hafs: يَوۡمَ يَقُومُ ٱلرُّوحُ وَٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ صَفّٗاۖ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ إِلَّا مَنۡ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابٗا ٣٨
text_uthmani: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلرُّوحُ وَٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ صَفًّا ۖ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابًا

translations.text: On the Day when the Spirit and the angels stand in rows, they will not speak except for those to whom the Lord of Mercy gives permission, who will say only what is right.

text_qpc_hafs: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمُ ٱلۡحَقُّۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔابًا ٣٩
text_uthmani: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔابًا

translations.text: That is the Day of Truth. So whoever wishes to do so should take the path that leads to his Lord.

text_qpc_hafs: إِنَّآ أَنذَرۡنَٰكُمۡ عَذَابٗا قَرِيبٗا يَوۡمَ يَنظُرُ ٱلۡمَرۡءُ مَا قَدَّمَتۡ يَدَاهُ وَيَقُولُ ٱلۡكَافِرُ يَٰلَيۡتَنِي كُنتُ تُرَٰبَۢا ٤٠
text_uthmani: إِنَّآ أَنذَرْنَـٰكُمْ عَذَابًا قَرِيبًا يَوْمَ يَنظُرُ ٱلْمَرْءُ مَا قَدَّمَتْ يَدَاهُ وَيَقُولُ ٱلْكَافِرُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى كُنتُ تُرَٰبًۢا

translations.text: We have warned you of imminent torment, on the Day when every person will see what their own hands have sent ahead for them, when the disbeliever will say, ‘If only I were dust!’

words.text_uthmani_tajweed: وَ<rule class=ham_wasl>ٱ</rule><rule class=laam_shamsiyah>ل</rule><rule class=ghunnah>نّ</rule>َ<rule class=madda_normal>ـٰ</rule>زِعَ<rule class=madda_normal>ـٰ</rule>تِ

translations.text: By the forceful chargers

words.text_uthmani_tajweed: وَ<rule class=ham_wasl>ٱ</rule><rule class=laam_shamsiyah>ل</rule><rule class=ghunnah>نّ</rule>َ<rule class=madda_normal>ـٰ</rule>شِطَ<rule class=madda_normal>ـٰ</rule>تِ

translations.text: raring to go,
sweeping ahead at full stretch,

translation.text: And those who race each other

translations.text: overtaking swiftly
to bring the matter to an end,
on the Day when the blast reverberates
and the second blast follows,
hearts will tremble
and eyes will be downcast.
They say, ‘What? shall we be brought back to life,
after we have turned into decayed bones?’ and they say,
‘Such a return is impossible!’
But all it will take is a single blast,
and they will be back above ground.
Have you [Prophet] heard the story of Moses?
